description: MSCI provides investment decision-support tools, data, analytics, indexes, and sustainability research for the global investment community. Its products include APIs and related tooling for accessing index, ESG, risk, optimization, and other financial data and analytics.
summary: MSCI exposes a developer portal of authenticated APIs, a Python SDK package (`msci.sdk`) for its Optimization Service/API access, and an OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://mcp.msci.com/mcp/v1.0/mcp`.
